content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 25, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 25, 2026, focused on expanding agent capabilities through x402 paid plugin routes, enhancing desktop window management for app surfaces, and refining message handling to improve agent communication reliability and data privacy.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Agent Monetization and Plugin Infrastructure**
*   Implemented x402 seller middleware to support paid plugin routes, including payment gating, startup validation, and comprehensive payment flow support ([#7100](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7100)).
*   Extended core route and payment types to support the new x402 architecture ([#7100](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7100)).

**Desktop and App Surface Enhancements**
*   Enabled opening app catalog selections in managed Electrobun windows, maintaining connectivity to page-scoped chat and control contexts ([#7092](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7092)).
*   Added support for always-on-top controls and improved window management for detached shells ([#7092](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7092)).

**Message Processing and Communication Reliability**
*   Fixed issues where agents leaked internal mechanism words or task lists into chat during failures or task management operations ([#7098](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7098), [#7095](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7095)).
*   Improved planner robustness by tolerating malformed XML and ensuring swarm synthesis results are correctly delivered to triggering rooms ([#7099](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7099), [#7090](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7090)).
*   Optimized action delegation to prevent passive bookkeeping actions from overriding primary turn ownership ([#7097](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7097)).

**Authentication and Character Management**
*   Resolved credential conflicts between Claude Code CLI and in-app OAuth to ensure accurate subscription status reporting ([#7094](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7094)).
*   Enabled tokenization of character names on save to ensure renames propagate correctly across the application ([#7101](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7101)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
